info.name: SAP Sales and Distribution (SD) SAP Pricing Condition Record API
info.description:
Create, read, update, and delete condition records for pricing in sales. This OData service (API_SLSPRCGCONDITIONRECORD_SRV) manages sales pricing condition records including price lists, discounts, surcharges, and freight conditions used to determine prices in sales documents within SAP S/4HANA.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support

item.name: Retrieve a list of pricing condition records

query.description: Maximum number of records to return

request.description: Returns a collection of sales pricing condition records. Use OData query options to filter by condition type, material, customer, sales organization, validity dates, and other attributes.

request.description: Creates a new sales pricing condition record. The request can include the condition record along with its validity periods, pricing scales, and supplements using deep insert.

item.name: Retrieve a single pricing condition record

request.description: Returns a single pricing condition record by its key. Use $expand to include validity periods, scales, and supplements.
